findings.message: Validation commands use `--filter reception` but the canonical package name is `@apps/reception`.
Smoke test does not validate provider-wiring path — only checks button label; does not open popover or assert SplitList/PaymentSplitRow/confirm button render.
Delivery rehearsal says 'closes and submits' but no popover-close action is wired on confirm.
Header says 88% but math resolves to 87%.
